---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{python}
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
import anndata as ad
import pandas as pd
import os
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
```

```{python}
carpall_blina = sc.read("1_carpall_blina_pre_qc.h5ad")
```

# identify mito, ribo and hb genes
```{python}
carpall_blina.var["mt"] = carpall_blina.var_names.str.startswith("MT-")
carpall_blina.var["ribo"] = carpall_blina.var_names.str.startswith(("RPS", "RPL"))
carpall_blina.var["hb"] = carpall_blina.var_names.str.contains(r"^HB[ABDEGMQZ]\d*(?!\w)")
```

```{python}
sc.pp.calculate_qc_metrics(
    carpall_blina, qc_vars=["mt", "ribo", "hb"], inplace=True, percent_top=[20], log1p=True
)
carpall_blina
```

```{python}
axes = sc.pl.violin(
    carpall_blina,
    ["pct_counts_mt", "pct_counts_ribo", "pct_counts_hb"],
    groupby="study",
    stripplot=False,
    show=False
)

for ax in axes:
    ax.grid(False)

fig = axes[0].get_figure()

fig.set_size_inches(7, 3)
fig.subplots_adjust(wspace=0.6)

fig.savefig("pre_qc_violins.png", dpi=300, bbox_inches="tight")
plt.close(fig)
```
